_source: Core Rules pp.83-84 — Patron Job Generation. CANONICAL DATA in data/patron_generation.json. This file provides legacy compatibility format for PatronJobManager.gd fallback.
_note: PatronJobManager, PatronJobGenerator, and PatronSystem now load from patron_generation.json first. This file is retained as fallback only.
name: Patron Job Generation Table (Legacy Format)
source: Five Parsecs from Home Core Rules pp.83-84

patron_contact_table._note: Core Rules p.82: Assign crew to Find a Patron task. Roll 2D6, 5+ = 1 patron found.
patron_contact_table.description: Roll 2D6 for patron contact (crew task: Find a Patron)

2-4.description: No patron contact made this turn

5-8.description: Found 1 patron. Roll D10 for patron type (see patron_generation.json).

9-12.description: Found 1 patron with favorable terms. Roll D10 for patron type.

job_type_table._note: DEPRECATED — mission objectives now in patron_generation.json mission_objectives section. These are Core Rules D10 objective types, not job categories.

job_payment_modifiers._note: Danger Pay from Core Rules p.83. No patron tiers — that was fabricated.
